textByHashes.bed46244b532b4a234b25273a980caee33546568: Thank you for enquiring at the Catherby Council Office. Your views are important to us. What is it I can do for you today?
textByHashes.3678b31bcd840f271d385fadc1f621f7582db4ff: If you are referring to the rumours of Humans Against Monsters sympathies within the Catherby Council, then I can assure you that a full impartial investigation found those rumours to be totally false.
textByHashes.c124b549713e2307899a1246fcc2ea22a86dad4b: All sailors doing business in Catherby must first be registered with the Catherby Council. Doing so requires completion of the appropriate form which is the fourth in the port series of the Catherby Registry form group.
textByHashes.4008932c49abdbb22f8ea89735a5219c69bb4ae1: Please ensure when filling in the form that all answers are clearly legible. Failure to do so may result in unnecessary processing delays.
textByHashes.262450827b9f29906906b0113bd5096134a4e034: Thanks to recent budget changes, I'm pleased to confirm that the Catherby Council are now able to provide charcoal free of charge. If required, you can find some in the cabinet to my left.
textByHashes.be92ca1c35a64a7a8768240a382cf02cebf28861: Upon completion, please return the form to the Catherby Council Office at your earliest convenience.
textByHashes.cc3aa9c2cd0a83c236ac176ad29e5167343b5b4c: Have you fully filled in that form?
textByHashes.e2b85e06d72448f158b84b909785f048111d1c5a: I am afraid there are still questions missing answers. Please make sure you fully fill the form in before you hand it in.
textByHashes.904a92f8ddc31980b1cac1d8409358a80dc68b1e: Thank you very much. However, I must inform you that the Catherby Council is currently experiencing higher than usual volumes of enquiries, so there may be some delays in the processing of your form.
textByHashes.25209ed88a0a62bba870a2c5c9ff14ad5a8f7d14: Then what is it I can help you with?
textByHashes.0b7ca39bd1a01ec15fc5b56d287d620321b56b57: Any change to the by-laws can only occur with approval from the Mayor of Catherby.
textByHashes.bb07b0e60250f4cc814aec7ef50e5035e86a9234: I'm afraid that due to the Catherby Data Protection Regulation, I am not at liberty to give out personal information on the mayor.
textByHashes.461c3f4911f3e3e02fd6bef28a6f567536ab70b9: Very serious. Now, if that's all, thank you for visiting the Catherby Council Office today.
textByHashes.f5a089885daa7f76944d9d8c18f207410657deca: We hope your experience was a positive one, but if you do have any feedback, I'd be more than happy to provide you with the relevant form.
textByHashes.bc7691a5864e372499cd039ef40746e56d9e5dfe: Then I wish you a very good day.
textByHashes.080f2cb29b80764d4db03a35cdf72f80041b8578: Please ensure that you have done so before you hand it in. Please also ensure that all answers are clearly legible. Failure to do so may result in unnecessary processing delays.
textByHashes.de2c5f6a2c2ceefdb5284fc0898e3c4b210ae281: Welcome to the Catherby Council Office. Your views are important to us. How can I help you today?
textByHashes.e3a47cdb4313c61162ce748074ce369981505413: I'm afraid that due to the Catherby Data Protection Regulation, I am not at liberty to give out personal information on the mayor. Now, if that's all, thank you for visiting the Catherby Council Office today.
textByHashes.7a59039307111e90d75f42671fa39b5d033404c8: I see... Well, if that's all, thank you for visiting the Catherby Council Office today.
textByHashes.33dce38cc79cb90bbcc5c86c3f01fac137e342d0: Are you sure? It doesn't look like the mayor. Where is his mayoral chain?
textByHashes.0d37fb7c63376c821f520afa8341b73f99b4393c: Hmm... Well, if that's all, thank you for visiting the Catherby Council Office today.
textByHashes.9ffb425da9d92cb2b5b88ec4de69b85e93b0aa2a: I'm afraid a recent audit has exposed irregularities in key paperwork filed with the Catherby Council Office. These irregularities must be addressed prior to any updates to the by-laws.
textByHashes.f0971bd3b166956c04ffcc1e3be88540e3bde656: Unfortunately, as you yourself have recently filed a form with the Catherby Council Office, I must now ask you to join me in reviewing that form to ensure everything is correct.
textByHashes.9e35ec554db473426d1b2a2a3ed09d68a5ce60f8: That seems unlikely. After all, you gave accurate information, did you not?
textByHashes.0904f364172cb7bc5f39c5d93eab427ddfe7074d: Very good. In that case, let us begin.
textByHashes.fda3b3304e62f72324318ccbc3f0de33fb130820: What is your main reason for making port at Catherby?
textByHashes.e0e115c0f4979147f7da2f50d927907ea6bec43d: How many hulls does your ship have?
textByHashes.88573f9041fd7a873b882015f8debf53e9ef7b1a: Is your ship insured against cargo spillage and theft?
textByHashes.748dad3d90b0b4cb61ee2e8e109870595f63ee42: Does your first mate have first aid training?
textByHashes.5280d88ba0cb92fa233ace93e70c61b57bec2979: Does your second mate have second aid training?
textByHashes.6ee5b77afb133ada69ff5095176d856efb9d5676: Have you experienced symptoms of plague in the last two weeks?
textByHashes.f3a57458448a9566ab09f7f3c21f9b12f53ae093: How much experience do you have sailing?
textByHashes.c0710923ec15c16ce0ff7f889287febbda67917d: Where would you say your home port is?
textByHashes.9f69e6dba28fc667c309c3391f14facd6eb967fc: Hmm, that all seems to be right...
textByHashes.1767f93d30ca176d8305850e52387fa83bbe224b: Yes, I suppose everything is in order. I have a form here that needs signing by the mayor. Please make some room so that I am able to give it to you.
textByHashes.9724ed25b1631cd1f5ba968602c462b097d06cfa: Yes, I suppose everything is in order. I just need this form signing by the mayor.
textByHashes.e52000b4ca69ca35ff28ecca441601a7af8373d9: Simply dip the form into his bowl and he will give it a nibble. We consider that to be his signature.
textByHashes.27751d6776c8ce05af35d30684bafc9b74adfa69: I'm afraid that one of your answers didn't match the original form. We will have to go through the incorrect questions again.
textByHashes.4feef70bd012bd6891db986979c43637b45f2488: I suppose so. You just need to get that form signed by the mayor. Simply dip the form into his bowl and he will give it a nibble. We consider that to be his signature.
textByHashes.b44bd2c970ab18b5f1dfecd8c183906503a419e6: Very well, but I would advise you take more care next time.
textByHashes.68b22ad919d3706d0cb15d7eb56e3aa3a5aa8005: The by-law has now been amended. Good day.
textByHashes.8d5447c874d35f52431a9fe35eae3a5bece8c6a2: Welcome to the Catherby Council Office. Your views are important to us.
textByHashes.cf3a8deec5dcaa9f2c743f629a837030dd894b85: Unfortunately, all of our operatives are too busy to help you today. Please try again soon.
